name: NewSoft Technology Corporation
summary: NewSoft Technology Corporation provides personal, enterprise Web, and digital signage solutions worldwide. The company offers personal solutions, including digital document, digital recognition, digital images, and mobile application solutions; and enterprise Web solutions, such as customer and salary management, electronic authorization, project management, attendance, resource management, performance management, document management, and digital signage systems. It also provides custom development services, which include optical character recognition software development kits (OCR SDK); identity card recognition software development kits (IDR SDK); driver and network, and document imaging cloud applications; mobile and cloud application customization; and digital image editing and management services. The company sells its products through store outlets, online channels, hardware distributors, and enterprise and government contact windows. NewSoft Technology Corporation was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
